title: SearchStep
description: One unit of a Task's solution decomposition. Internal to the tutor; not shown verbatim to the student.

targetLabel.description: Name of the variable or quantity being solved for.

thinkingToolIds.description: ThinkingTools expected to be applicable to this step.

solutionTex.description: Optional canonical written form of the step's solution; used only when the student has earned full reveal.

jStar.description: Lowest hint level that may NOT be delivered without an explicit hint_requested event. Defaults to 1.
